reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar lastima no nos dejaron armar la carpa para dormir solo una noche un parque grande con fogones y mesas .

(Translated by Google)
Nice place, too bad they didn't let us set up our tent for just one night. It's a large park with fire pits and tables.

reviews.comment:
Las amburgusas muy fea no se de qué son porque carne no es es una cosa seca fría pan incomible es tirar la plata el combo 13.800 pesos  solo las papas son buenas me arrepiento de no pedir que me muestre lo que iba a comprar en la foto te muestra con tomates y lechuga y nada de eso te dan

(Translated by Google)
The hamburgers were awful, I don't know what they're made of because it's not meat, it's just a dry, cold thing. The bread is inedible, it's a waste of money. The combo is 13,800 pesos, only the fries are good. I regret not asking them to show me what I was buying; the picture shows tomatoes and lettuce, but you don't get any of that.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pWNmRXUnNRMGgzYjNSc1JWTnVlbUZITUdzM2NVRRAB
